violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. Wet sanitizer towel left out on the counter next to the handwash sink.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop stored in the mop sink, not placed in a position to dry properly.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
